mapper.insert: insert into reports (report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail) values ( reports_seq.nextval, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{memberId}, #{reasonCode}, #{reasonDetail} )
mapper.update: update reports set reason_code = #{reasonCode}, reason_detail = #{reasonDetail}, updated_at = sysdate where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' and status = 'PENDING'
update reports set delete_yn = 'Y' where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' and status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: select report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, created_at from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' order by report_id desc offset #{start} rows fetch next #{end} rows only
select count(*) from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N'

select report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, created_at, updated_at from reports where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N'
select count(*) from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' and created_at >= trunc(sysdate) and created_at < trunc(sysdate) +1

select (mi.trust_score + coalesce(ma.approved_cnt, 0) * 2 - coalesce(ma.noshow_cnt, 0) * 10 - (coalesce(r_met.report_cnt, 0) + coalesce(r_rev.report_cnt, 0)) * 5 ) as calculated_trust_score from members m join member_info mi on m.member_id = mi.member_id
left join ( select member_id, count(case when status = 'APPROVED' then 1 end) as approved_cnt, count(case when status = 'NOSHOW' then 1 end) as noshow_cnt from meetup_applications where member_id = #{memberId} and updated_at >= sysdate - 90 group by member_id ) ma on m.member_id = ma.member_id
left join ( select mt.member_id, count(r.report_id) as report_cnt from reports r join meetups mt on r.target_type = 'MEETUP' and r.target_id = mt.meetup_id where mt.member_id = #{memberId} and r.status = 'APPROVED' and r.delete_yn = 'N' and r.updated_at >= sysdate - 90 group by mt.member_id ) r_met on m.member_id = r_met.member_id
left join ( select rv.member_id, count(r.report_id) as report_cnt from reports r join reviews rv on r.target_type = 'REVIEW' and r.target_id = rv.review_id where rv.member_id = #{memberId} and r.status = 'APPROVED' and r.delete_yn = 'N' and r.updated_at >= sysdate - 90 group by rv.member_id ) r_rev on m.member_id = r_rev.member_id
where m.member_id = #{memberId}

select m.member_id as targetMemberId, m.nickname as targetNickname, mi.trust_score as trustScore, mi.report_status_id as reportStatusId, mrs.status_code as statusCode, mrs.status_name as statusName from members m left join member_info mi on m.member_id = mi.member_id left join member_report_status mrs on mi.report_status_id = mrs.report_status_id where m.member_id = #{targetMemberId}
select count(*) from meetup_applications where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'APPROVED' and updated_at >= sysdate - 90
select count(*) from meetup_applications where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'NOSHOW' and updated_at >= sysdate - 90

select member_id from meetup_applications where status in ('APPROVED', 'NOSHOW') and (updated_at >= trunc(sysdate) -1 and updated_at < trunc(sysdate))
union
select mt.member_id from reports r join meetups mt on r.target_type = 'MEETUP' and r.target_id = mt.meetup_id where r.status = 'APPROVED' and (r.updated_at >= trunc(sysdate) -1 and r.updated_at < trunc(sysdate))
union
select rv.member_id from reports r join reviews rv on r.target_type = 'REVIEW' and r.target_id = rv.review_id where r.status = 'APPROVED' and (r.updated_at >= trunc(sysdate) -1 and r.updated_at < trunc(sysdate))
select m.email from reports r join members m on r.member_id = m.member_id where r.status = 'APPROVED' and r.updated_at >= trunc(sysdate) - 3 and r.updated_at < trunc(sysdate) - 2
